title: Events/ Exhibition Designer (2D/ 3D)
description:
We can’t promise to fix all your problems at work but we can promise you won’t have to face them alone! Here at Twist, you are never alone!


Twist Media is made up of a team of experienced and passionate professionals who are committed to creating events that matter.

Our team is currently expanding and we are looking for a talented and motivated Creative Designer to join us. We need someone who is quick thinking with a passion for events and enjoys working in a fun environment.

If you understand Events and Experiential Design – we want to hear from you!


About TWIST


Behind the extraordinary success of Twist Media is a team of passionate and dedicated professionals, who do what they love and love what they do. When the global pandemic hit, we didn’t just adapt, we led the way! From live events to virtual and now hybrid events, we’re always ahead of the curve. At Twist, every day is a new adventure. From epic conferences to cozy networking nights, national campaigns to wild parties – we do it all! Get ready to be part of something extraordinary at Twist!


Check out our facebook https://www.facebook.com/twistmedia.sg/ and website www.twistmedia.sg to learn more about our events and our twisters’ culture!


This is what we would like to see in a Creative Designer:

· Experience in events and exhibition industries will be highly-valued

· Great attitude and takes pride in your work

· Ability to see a project from idea generation, concept development, through to final output

· Ability to tailor creative thinking and approach to best serve project objectives and client needs

· Ability to work quickly, efficiently, and calmly under pressure

· Ability to work independently or in support of all or any creative department members

· Meticulous attention to detail

· A thorough understanding of layout and visual communication theory

· A high degree of proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite - Illustrator, InDesign and Photoshop as a minimum

· Experience with 3D design, Autodesk 3ds Max, will be an advantage


You will join a tight knit team in a progressive agency that rewards great work and encourages work-life balance.


If you are keen on working in a fast-paced team, understand experiential design, is committed to demonstrating critical and creative thinking, as well as pushing technical boundaries, come say hello to us.


Please submit your portfolio together with your resume. Thanks

postedCompany.description:
TWIST MEDIA PTE. LTD.

Behind the extraordinary success of Twist Media is a team of passionate and dedicated professionals, who do what they love and love what they do. Overtime, we have built up a strong network of clienteles from the government agencies and corporate organisations. No event is too big or small for us. The events we managed include conferences & seminars, awards ceremonies, national campaigns, exhibitions and many more.
